tool.name: dustmasker
tool.description: NCBI symmetric-DUST low-complexity intervals as content-annotated BED6
tool.command: set -o pipefail && #if str($input.ext) == 'fasta.gz' gunzip -c '$input' #else cat '$input' #end if | awk '/^>/{print;next}{print toupper(\$0)}' > in.fa && dustmasker -in in.fa -outfmt interval | awk -f '$__tool_directory__/interval2bed.awk' | python3 '$__tool_directory__/lc_classify.py' in.fa - | LC_ALL=C sort -k1,1 -k2,2n > '$output'
tool.help: **dustmasker** (NCBI BLAST+) — symmetric-DUST low-complexity intervals, emitted as **BED6** with per-interval content: name = repeat-unit signature (``polyA``, ``(AT)n``, ``lc`` ...), score = unit purity x1000 (UCSC grayscale), strand = ``.``. Maintained replacement for the unmaintained standalone ``sdust``. The input is upper-cased first so masking is computed de novo (independent of any pre-existing soft-masking).
